_comment: ByrdCast Swap V0 config (docs/BYRDCAST_SWAP_V0.md). Target-image-first local face swap for the RTX 3070 8GB / i9-10850K / 32GB box. Hosts are NEVER hardcoded — the ComfyUI URL is read from byrdhouse.config.json services.comfyui. This file holds only tunables. identities_root uses <identity> as the folder name; approved references live in <identities_root>/<identity>/approved.

hardware._comment: 8GB rules: batch 1, no video, modest resolution first, unload LM Studio before the heavy ComfyUI pass, never assume >8GB.

reference_selection._comment: Weights for choosing the best approved reference against the target face. Higher weight = matters more. When a detector cannot measure a factor (e.g. angle/expression without landmarks), that factor is recorded as neutral and the weights renormalize over what WAS measured — honest, never a silent guess.

masks._comment: Geometric mask fractions relative to the detected face box; used when a semantic parser is unavailable. face = inner oval; jaw = lower third; hairline = top band; ears = side bands; neck = below-chin band; skin = union minus hair band. Feather softens every boundary.

swap._comment: Route order tried in turn; the first available wins and is recorded. 'comfy_reactor' submits the workflow to the configured ComfyUI; 'insightface' runs inswapper in-process if the package is importable. If none is available the job fails closed (accepted=false).

refine._comment: Masked restore/refinement AFTER the swap — face-only, must not touch hair/clothes/background. FaceDetailer (Impact Pack) if present, else a light face-only sharpen. Optional low-denoise inpaint blend around the face/hair/neck seam.

scoring._comment: Candidate score 0-1 per factor, then a weighted overall. accept_threshold gates accepted=true; below it the run is SAVED but marked accepted=false with the weakest factors named. identity_similarity uses the face embedding cosine when both sides were embedded (insightface); otherwise it is recorded as unmeasured and cannot alone pass the gate.

quality_modes._comment: quality flag presets. fast = swap + light restore, no inpaint blend; best = swap + FaceDetailer + inpaint blend + the larger refine size.
